title: Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary
tagline: Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary — spiritual town of Chhattisgarh

heroImage.alt: Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary, Chhattisgarh

overview.short: The Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary is located in Kunkuri town in Jashpur district of Chhattisgarh state in India.
overview.description: The Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary is located in Kunkuri town in Jashpur district of Chhattisgarh state in India. The cathedral was founded in 1962 in the period of Bishop Stanislas Tigga. J. M. Karsi drew its map and Joseph Toppo started its construction. After his death Manustain S. J. completed its construction in the period of Bishop Francis Ekka.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Jashpur
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Jashpur (Latin: Dioecesis Jashpurensis) in India was created on March 23, 2006. It is a suffragan diocese of the Archdiocese of Raipur.

topPlaces.name: Kunkuri
topPlaces.description: Kunkuri is a town in Jashpur District of Chhattisgarh, India. It is located 28 KM towards west from District headquarter Jashpur Nagar.

items.note: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Jashpur (Latin: Dioecesis Jashpurensis) in India was created on March 23, 2006. It is a suffragan diocese of the Archdiocese of Raipur.
Kunkuri is a town in Jashpur District of Chhattisgarh, India. It is located 28 KM towards west from District headquarter Jashpur Nagar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (153 km) and the nearest railway station is Sambalpur Junction (142 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary?
faq.a: Stays in Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Cathedral of Our Lady of the Rosary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diocese of Jashpur, Kunkuri.
